purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured v3.51.15 owner-only installed-plugin recovery surface produces 4,537,693 raw / 1,299,419 gzip JavaScript bytes: +8,054 raw / +1,992 gzip (+0.178% raw) versus the reviewed v3.51.14 artifact. The total ceilings retain only the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances. Largest JavaScript raw rises by the measured 2,645-byte product-contract delta and remains exact; largest gzip retains only the existing 35-byte allowance. CSS raw rises by the measured 38-byte responsive wrapping rule while its gzip ceiling does not increase. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
